title: SUMMER RUNNING CAMPS - 211info
text: ULTIMOOK RUNNING CAMP SUMMER RUNNING CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a long-distance running camp on the Oregon Coast with unique training runs, focused on building character, leadership, and teamwork. 9455 Kilchis River Road Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Ages 12-18 Hours: Sunday, July 26, 2026-Saturday, August 8, 2026 Email (503) 812-9190 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 812-9190 Main Phone Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: See website FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ULTIMOOK RUNNING CAMP
